string.text: Standard magazine for the M1918 BAR, its varients, and the Ohio Ordinance HCAR.\nHolds 20 rounds of .30-06 Sprinfield.\n
An extended but much heavier magazine for the M1918 BAR, its varients, and the Ohio Ordinance HCAR.\nHolds 20 rounds of .30-06 Sprinfield.\n

A very rare prototype magazine for the M1918 BAR that holds 40 rounds of .30-06 Springfield to assist in Anti-Aircraft roles\nHow ever due to its size and frequent jams, this 40 round magazine was disconnintued in the 1920s\n
